---
title: "Methodology"
---

# Methodology

We drew upon data from the [Dutch Chamber of Commerce](https://www.kvk.nl/) to build the Third Place Index. We classified all registered entities in the Dutch Chamber of Commerce as belonging to one of the following sectors: 

- Food & Beverage: e.g, restaurants, cafés, or bars
- Retail: e.g., supermarkets, department stores, or small business
- Community Centres: e.g., libraries, youth centres
- Cultural Venues: e.g, cinemas, bookstores, or theatres
- Sport & Leisure: e.g., gyms, or attraction parks
- Medical Services: e.g., pharmacies, hospitals, or doctors

The exact codebook can be downloaded on Github:  [Download Sector Classification Codebook](https://www.kvk.nl/)

We calculated the number of Third Places of each of these sectors per PC-4 postcode.
